title: CompositionLayerColorMatrixModifier
description: Color transformation using a 4x5 matrix applied to the composed layer output.

matrix.description: 4x5 color matrix encoded as 20 numbers in row-major order. Input and output color channels are normalized to [0, 1]. The transform for each output channel is: R' = m[0]*R + m[1]*G + m[2]*B + m[3]*A + m[4], G' = m[5]*R + m[6]*G + m[7]*B + m[8]*A + m[9], B' = m[10]*R + m[11]*G + m[12]*B + m[13]*A + m[14], A' = m[15]*R + m[16]*G + m[17]*B + m[18]*A + m[19]. Each output channel is clamped to [0, 1] after evaluation.
